description: Hot-air balloon flight conditions for Cappadocia - likelihood that flights will be cleared on each morning, broken down by every weather factor that drives the call. Open data, open source.

panels.title: Next sunrise window verdict - $launch_site
panels.description: Worst-case score across the 04-07 local-time launch window of the next morning, calibrated against the LTAZ TAF (cap at 25 if the TAF flags TS/CB convection) and bounded above at 85 (we don't claim certainty SHM has).

targets.rawSql: WITH our_raw AS (  SELECT MIN(flight_score) AS s  FROM forecast_hourly f  WHERE f.location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site')    AND f.model_run = (SELECT MAX(model_run) FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site'))    AND f.valid_time AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul' >= (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' + TIME '04:00') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul'    AND f.valid_time AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul' <  (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' + TIME '08:00') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul'), taf AS (SELECT taf_no_fly FROM v_taf_day_flags WHERE local_date = (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')::date) SELECT LEAST(85, CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT taf_no_fly FROM taf), FALSE) THEN LEAST((SELECT s FROM our_raw), 25) ELSE (SELECT s FROM our_raw) END) AS score

panels.title: Tomorrow's flight score
panels.description: 0-100. ≥70 = HIGH CHANCE, 40-69 = MAYBE, <40 = NO CHANCE. Calibrated: capped at 25 if LTAZ TAF flags convection; ceiling at 85.

targets.rawSql: WITH our_raw AS (  SELECT MIN(flight_score) AS s  FROM forecast_hourly f  WHERE f.location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site')    AND f.model_run = (SELECT MAX(model_run) FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site'))    AND f.valid_time AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul' >= (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' + TIME '04:00') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul'    AND f.valid_time AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul' <  (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' + TIME '08:00') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul'), taf AS (SELECT taf_no_fly FROM v_taf_day_flags WHERE local_date = (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')::date) SELECT LEAST(85, CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT taf_no_fly FROM taf), FALSE) THEN LEAST((SELECT s FROM our_raw), 25) ELSE (SELECT s FROM our_raw) END) AS score

panels.title: Live METAR - Kapadokya (LTAZ)
panels.description: Latest METAR observation. CAVOK = ceiling and visibility OK (≥10km, no significant cloud below 5000ft).

targets.rawSql: SELECT wind_speed_kt AS "Wind kt", wind_dir_deg AS "Dir °", wind_gust_kt AS "Gust kt", flight_cat AS "Cat" FROM metar_observations WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug='ltaz') ORDER BY obs_time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Daily sunrise-window verdict per launch site
panels.description: Worst-case verdict across each morning's 04-07 local launch window for every launch site over the next 10 days.

targets.rawSql: SELECT (local_date + TIME '06:00') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul' AS time, location_name AS metric, CASE WHEN min_score < 40 THEN 'NO CHANCE'      WHEN min_score < 70 THEN 'MAYBE'      ELSE 'HIGH CHANCE' END AS value FROM v_sunrise_window_calibrated WHERE local_date >= CURRENT_DATE   AND local_date <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '10 days' ORDER BY time, metric

panels.title: Flight score (hourly)
panels.description: Composite likelihood, hour by hour. Vertical bands at 70 (GO) and 40 (MARGINAL).

targets.rawSql: SELECT valid_time AS time, flight_score AS "score" FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site') AND model_run = (SELECT MAX(model_run) FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site')) AND $__timeFilter(valid_time) ORDER BY valid_time

panels.title: Wind speed at 10m vs 80m vs 120m vs 180m (km/h)
panels.description: Pilots steer balloons by climbing into different wind layers. Look for variation across altitudes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT valid_time AS time, wind_speed_10m_kmh AS "10m", wind_speed_80m_kmh AS "80m", wind_speed_120m_kmh AS "120m", wind_speed_180m_kmh AS "180m" FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site') AND model_run = (SELECT MAX(model_run) FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site')) AND $__timeFilter(valid_time) ORDER BY valid_time

panels.title: Surface wind & gusts
panels.description: Surface wind > 18 km/h or gusts > 25 km/h are typically a no-go. Big gust spread is dangerous on launch.

targets.rawSql: SELECT valid_time AS time, wind_speed_10m_kmh AS "Mean", wind_gusts_10m_kmh AS "Gusts" FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site') AND model_run = (SELECT MAX(model_run) FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site')) AND $__timeFilter(valid_time) ORDER BY valid_time

panels.title: Visibility (m) - fog risk
panels.description: Below 3000m is typically a no-go. Below 5000m is marginal. Cappadocia mornings can trap valley fog.

targets.rawSql: SELECT valid_time AS time, visibility_m AS "Visibility" FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site') AND model_run = (SELECT MAX(model_run) FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site')) AND $__timeFilter(valid_time) ORDER BY valid_time

panels.title: CAPE (J/kg) & Lifted Index - convective risk
panels.description: CAPE > 500 J/kg or LI < -2 = thunderstorm risk → no-go. Even distant storms produce dangerous gust fronts.

targets.rawSql: SELECT valid_time AS time, cape_jkg AS "CAPE", lifted_index AS "Lifted Index" FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site') AND model_run = (SELECT MAX(model_run) FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site')) AND $__timeFilter(valid_time) ORDER BY valid_time

panels.title: Precipitation (mm/h)
panels.description: Any measurable rain or snow grounds a passenger flight.

targets.rawSql: SELECT valid_time AS time, precipitation_mm AS "Precip" FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site') AND model_run = (SELECT MAX(model_run) FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site')) AND $__timeFilter(valid_time) ORDER BY valid_time

panels.title: Cloud cover (%) - low / mid / high
panels.description: Low cloud determines ceiling. High cloud is mostly cosmetic but reduces sunrise photo quality.

targets.rawSql: SELECT valid_time AS time, cloud_cover_low_pct AS "Low", cloud_cover_mid_pct AS "Mid", cloud_cover_high_pct AS "High" FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site') AND model_run = (SELECT MAX(model_run) FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site')) AND $__timeFilter(valid_time) ORDER BY valid_time

panels.title: Boundary layer height (m) - inversion proxy
panels.description: Very shallow boundary layer at sunrise often coincides with valley fog and inversions.

targets.rawSql: SELECT valid_time AS time, boundary_layer_m AS "BLH" FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site') AND model_run = (SELECT MAX(model_run) FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site')) AND $__timeFilter(valid_time) ORDER BY valid_time

panels.title: Historical morning GO rate (last 90 days)
panels.description: Share of mornings in the last 90 days where conditions would have been GO.

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN min_score >= 70 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS go_rate FROM v_sunrise_window_calibrated WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site')   AND local_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'

panels.title: Recent METAR observations (LTAZ + LTAU)
panels.description: Live aviation observations from Kapadokya and Kayseri airports, last 12 hours.

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.obs_time AS "Time", l.icao AS "ICAO", m.wind_speed_kt AS "Wind kt", m.wind_dir_deg AS "Dir °", m.wind_gust_kt AS "Gust", m.flight_cat AS "Cat", m.raw AS "Raw" FROM metar_observations m JOIN locations l ON l.id = m.location_id WHERE m.obs_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '12 hours' ORDER BY m.obs_time DESC LIMIT 50

options.content:
**A simple guide for visitors and tour guides.** This page tells you whether balloons are likely to fly over Cappadocia each morning, in plain language.

**HIGH CHANCE** - Conditions look great. Flights very likely.  
**MAYBE** - Borderline. Operators may run with reduced slots or cancel last minute.  
**NO CHANCE** - Bad weather expected. Flights almost certainly cancelled.

**Heads up:** This is unofficial. The real call is made by Turkey's Civil Aviation (SHGM) at ~04:00 each morning. Even on **HIGH CHANCE** mornings, weather can shift; even on **NO CHANCE** mornings, conditions can sometimes improve. Always book with an operator that gives you a refund or rebook on cancellation, and add a buffer day or two to your trip.

**What the panels mean (quick translation):**
- *Wind speeds* - calm is good, strong = grounded.  
- *Visibility* - fog is the #1 cause of cancellations.  
- *Precipitation* - any rain or snow grounds flights.  
- *CAPE / Lifted Index* - thunderstorm risk.  
- *Boundary layer* - very low at sunrise often means valley fog.

Open data, open source. Forecasts from [Open-Meteo](https://open-meteo.com), live aviation observations from [aviationweather.gov](https://aviationweather.gov).

panels.title: Cappadocia launch sites - satellite
panels.description: Six known balloon launch sites overlaid on satellite imagery. Marker color shows current 24-hour flight likelihood at each site.

targets.rawSql: SELECT l.name AS site, l.latitude AS lat, l.longitude AS lon, COALESCE(MIN(f.flight_score), 50) AS score FROM locations l LEFT JOIN forecast_hourly f ON f.location_id = l.id AND f.model_run = (SELECT MAX(model_run) FROM forecast_hourly WHERE location_id = l.id) AND f.valid_time AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul' >= (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' + TIME '04:00') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul' AND f.valid_time AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul' < (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' + TIME '08:00') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul' WHERE l.kind = 'launch_site' GROUP BY l.id, l.name, l.latitude, l.longitude

panels.title: Live wind & weather over Cappadocia
panels.description: Real-time animated wind from Windy.com. Click the icons on the left to switch to clouds, satellite, temperature, etc.

panels.title: Current wind direction (LTAZ)
panels.description: Latest reported wind direction at Kapadokya Airport, in compass terms.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN wind_dir_vrb THEN 'Variable' WHEN wind_dir_deg IS NULL THEN ' - ' WHEN wind_dir_deg < 22.5 OR wind_dir_deg >= 337.5 THEN 'N (north)' WHEN wind_dir_deg < 67.5  THEN 'NE (north-east)' WHEN wind_dir_deg < 112.5 THEN 'E (east)' WHEN wind_dir_deg < 157.5 THEN 'SE (south-east)' WHEN wind_dir_deg < 202.5 THEN 'S (south)' WHEN wind_dir_deg < 247.5 THEN 'SW (south-west)' WHEN wind_dir_deg < 292.5 THEN 'W (west)' ELSE 'NW (north-west)' END AS direction FROM metar_observations WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug='ltaz') ORDER BY obs_time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Pressure trend (3h)
panels.description: Change in mean sea-level pressure over the last 3 hours vs. the 3 hours before that. Falling pressure (negative) often precedes worsening weather; rising pressure points to settling conditions.

targets.rawSql: WITH last6 AS (  SELECT pressure_msl_hpa, valid_time,          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY valid_time DESC) rn   FROM forecast_hourly   WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site')     AND model_run = (SELECT MAX(model_run) FROM forecast_hourly                      WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site'))     AND valid_time <= NOW() + INTERVAL '6 hours'     AND valid_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' ) SELECT (AVG(CASE WHEN rn <= 3 THEN pressure_msl_hpa END) -         AVG(CASE WHEN rn  > 3 THEN pressure_msl_hpa END)) AS delta_hpa FROM last6

panels.title: Days since last NO-CHANCE morning
panels.description: Consecutive days where the morning was at least MAYBE at the selected launch site. Resets when our score for any past morning was below 40.

targets.rawSql: SELECT GREATEST(0, EXTRACT(DAY FROM (NOW() - COALESCE(MAX(local_date)::timestamptz, NOW() - INTERVAL '999 days'))))::int AS days FROM v_sunrise_window WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site')   AND min_score < 40   AND local_date < CURRENT_DATE

panels.title: Yesterday's verdict vs. reality
panels.description: Sanity check: was our verdict for yesterday consistent with what METAR actually observed at LTAZ during the launch window? Builds trust by showing we check ourselves.

targets.rawSql: WITH y_pred AS (   SELECT MIN(min_score) AS pred_score   FROM v_sunrise_window   WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug = '$launch_site')     AND local_date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' ), y_obs AS (   SELECT MAX(wind_speed_kt) AS max_wind,          MIN(visibility_m)  AS min_vis   FROM metar_observations   WHERE location_id = (SELECT id FROM locations WHERE slug='ltaz')     AND obs_time AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul' >= ((CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') + TIME '04:00') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul'     AND obs_time AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul' <  ((CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') + TIME '08:00') AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul' ) SELECT CASE   WHEN p.pred_score IS NULL THEN 0   WHEN o.max_wind IS NULL THEN 1   WHEN p.pred_score >= 70 AND o.max_wind < 10 AND o.min_vis > 5000 THEN 3   WHEN p.pred_score <  40 AND (o.max_wind >= 10 OR o.min_vis < 3000) THEN 3   WHEN p.pred_score >= 40 AND p.pred_score < 70 THEN 2   ELSE 1 END AS match FROM y_pred p, y_obs o

options.content: Open data, open source. If this saved your sunrise (or your booking), consider chipping in toward the €5/month hosting cost.☕ Buy me a coffee★ Star on GitHub

panels.title: Official SHM call for $launch_site
panels.description: Live verdict from Slot Hizmet Merkezi (Kapadokya University) for the SHM sector containing this launch site. Avanos = Sektör A, Göreme/Çavuşin/Uçhisar/Ortahisar = Sektör B, Ürgüp = Sektör C. Source: shmkapadokya.kapadokya.edu.tr

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE l.shm_sector || '|' || s.flag WHEN 'A|red' THEN 0 WHEN 'B|red' THEN 0 WHEN 'C|red' THEN 0 WHEN 'A|yellow' THEN 1 WHEN 'B|yellow' THEN 1 WHEN 'C|yellow' THEN 1 WHEN 'A|green' THEN 2 WHEN 'B|green' THEN 2 WHEN 'C|green' THEN 2 ELSE NULL END AS state FROM locations l LEFT JOIN v_shm_latest s ON s.sector = l.shm_sector WHERE l.slug = '$launch_site'

list.name: launch_site
list.label: Launch site
list.query: SELECT name AS __text, slug AS __value FROM locations WHERE kind = 'launch_site' ORDER BY id

list.name: shm_meta
list.label: SHM metadata
list.query: SELECT 'Sektör ' || l.shm_sector || ' · Issued ' || to_char(s.issued_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul', 'HH24:MI') || ' · Valid ' || to_char(s.valid_from AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul', 'HH24:MI') || ' - ' || to_char(s.valid_to AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Istanbul', 'HH24:MI') || ' local · source shmkapadokya.kapadokya.edu.tr' FROM locations l LEFT JOIN v_shm_latest s ON s.sector = l.shm_sector WHERE l.slug = '$launch_site'

title: Cappadocia Balloon Flight Conditions
